title: China's Xi Jinping promotes two PLA generals after anti-corruption purge thins top military ranks
summary_full: China's leader, Xi Jinping, has made notable advancements by promoting two military officials to generals, marking a pivotal change in the People's Liberation Army's hierarchy. Following rigorous anti-corruption efforts that reshaped the leadership structure, these promotions are essential for restoring loyalty and filling key positions within the Central Military Commission, setting the stage for a comprehensive reorganization prior to the forthcoming Communist Party congress.
